name: pm-skill-lap
description: PM Skills Like A Pro: exhaustive Claude marketplace synthesizing phuryn/pm-skills and deanpeters/Product-Manager-Skills into 100 skills, 54 workflows, and 12 plugins with /pm-skills-select as the router.

plugins.name: pm-skills-select
plugins.description: Selects the best PM plugin, skill, command, or multi-step workflow for a product-management situation. Use first when unsure which PM skill to use.

plugins.name: pm-product-discovery-lap
plugins.description: Discovery, customer learning, assumptions, experiments, JTBD, interviews, opportunities, personas, journeys, and validation.

plugins.name: pm-product-strategy-lap
plugins.description: Product strategy, vision, value proposition, business model, pricing, competitive landscape, working backwards, and market choices.

plugins.name: pm-execution-lap
plugins.description: PRDs, OKRs, roadmaps, sprints, retros, release notes, stories, epics, test scenarios, pre-mortems, and stakeholder management.

plugins.name: pm-market-research-lap
plugins.description: Personas, segmentation, journey maps, market sizing, competitor analysis, company research, and sentiment analysis.

plugins.name: pm-data-analytics-lap
plugins.description: SQL generation, cohort analysis, A/B test analysis, metrics diagnostics, retention curves, and dashboards.

plugins.name: pm-go-to-market-lap
plugins.description: GTM strategy, beachhead segments, ICP, growth loops, GTM motions, acquisition channels, launch planning, and battlecards.

plugins.name: pm-marketing-growth-lap
plugins.description: Marketing ideas, positioning, value-prop statements, product naming, North Star metrics, and organic growth diagnostics.

plugins.name: pm-finance-saas-lap
plugins.description: SaaS finance metrics, unit economics, business health, pricing economics, feature investment, and acquisition efficiency.

plugins.name: pm-ai-product-lap
plugins.description: AI readiness, context engineering, recommendation canvases, Proof of Life probes, and AI product validation.

plugins.name: pm-career-leadership-lap
plugins.description: Product sense interview coaching, director readiness, VP/CPO readiness, executive onboarding, and leadership altitude frameworks.

plugins.name: pm-toolkit-lap
plugins.description: Resume review, proofreading, NDA drafting, privacy policies, dummy data, and skill authoring support.
